productDisplayName: Marvel Navy Blue Boys Casual Shoes
description: Style Note This summer we bring to you a pair of canvas sneakers from Spider-Man that your little hero will not want to take off! Featuring an attractive print and a cushioned outsole, this pair is a unique blend of style and comfort. Team it with a frock and a matching hairband for a hot summer day. Product Details Navy blue printed canvas upper for flexibility and durability PU covering for toe-box Central lacing for a custom Fit Padded footbed with fabric lining for sweat-free comfort and heel patch Durable PU outsole with diamond lugs and grooves for absolute grip and traction Material and Care Canvas, PU Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlight  Style NoteThis summer we bring to you a pair of canvas sneakers from Spider-Man that your little hero will not want to take off!
